zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg於1075年7月8日出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯阿斯格時，他的父親Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsberg35歲，母親Mechtild von Northeim30歲。他於大約1107年與Adelheid van Limburg結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1124年2月11日在他的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯阿斯格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

nameMeanings.name: 'der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg was born on 8 July 1075, in Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsberg, was 35 and his mother, Mechtild von Northeim, was 30. He married Adelheid van Limburg about 1107. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 11 February 1124, in his hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg est né le 8 juillet 1075, à Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsberg, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mechtild von Northeim, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Adelheid van Limburg environ 1107. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 11 février 1124, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg am 8. Juli 1075 in Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsberg 35 und seine Mutter Mechtild von Northeim 30. Er hat um 1107 Adelheid van Limburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 11. Februar 1124 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg è nato il il 8 luglio 1075 nel Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, il suo padre, Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsberg, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Mechtild von Northeim, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Adelheid van Limburg circa 1107. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 11 febbraio 1124, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsbergが1075年7月8日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンホーチサウエルランドクレイスアルンスバーグで生まれた時，父Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsbergは35歳，母Mechtild von Northeimは30歳であった。約1107年にAdelheid van Limburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1124年2月11日に故郷で48歳で死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンホーチサウエルランドクレイスアルンスバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.Arnsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschla: 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 오버버지슈어 크레이스 위p르프u르스 아른스버그
ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg(이)가 1075년 7월 8일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 호크소를랜드크레이스 아른스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsberg(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mechtild von Northeim(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1107년 Adelheid van Limburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1124년 2월 11일 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 호크소를랜드크레이스 아른스버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg nasceu em 8 de julho de 1075, em Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsberg, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mechtild von Northeim, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelheid van Limburg aproximadamente 1107. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1124, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.Arnsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschla: арнсбирг, виппирфuрт, обирбиргищир крис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg родился 8 июля 1075 г. в местности арнсбирг, хочсауирландкрис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsberg было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechtild von Northeim, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelheid van Limburg около 1107 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 11 февраля 1124 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности арнсбирг, хочсауирландкрис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg nació el 8 de julio de 1075, en Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Konrad II. von Werl-Arnsberg, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mechtild von Northeim, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Adelheid van Limburg aproximadamente 1107. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 11 de febrero de 1124, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
